data.html:
// This is your Prisma schema file,
// learn more about it in the docs: https://pris.ly/d/prisma-schema

generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "sqlite"
  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")
}

model User {
  id              String   @id @default(cuid())
  email           String   @unique
  name            String?
  password        String?
  role            String   @default("subscriber") // subscriber, provider, admin
  avatar          String?
  emailVerified   Boolean  @default(false)
  emailVerifiedAt DateTime?
  googleId        String?  @unique
  lastLoginAt     DateTime?
  createdAt       DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime @updatedAt

  provider        Provider?
  applications    ProviderApplication[]
  subscriptions   Subscription[]
  payments        Payment[]
  notifications   Notification[]
  reviews         Review[]
}

model Provider {
  id                 String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId             String   @unique
  displayName        String
  bio                String?
  avatar             String?
  pairs              String   @default("")
  timeframes         String   @default("")
  currency           String   @default("UGX")
  monthlyPrice       Float    @default(0)
  weeklyPrice        Float    @default(0)
  quarterlyPrice     Float    @default(0)
  yearlyPrice        Float    @default(0)
  subscribers        Int      @default(0)
  isVerified         Boolean  @default(false)
  verifiedAt         DateTime?
  isActive           Boolean  @default(true)
  totalSignals       Int      @default(0)
  winRate            Float    @default(0)
  totalPips          Float    @default(0)
  avgRR              Float    @default(0)
  tier               String   @default("new") // new, registered, verified, top, elite
  averageRating      Float    @default(0)
  totalReviews       Int      @default(0)
  binanceWallet      String?
  ethereumWallet     String?
  mtnMomoNumber      String?
  airtelMoneyNumber  String?
  createdAt          DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt          DateTime @updatedAt

  user              User        @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  signals           Signal[]
  subscriptions     Subscription[]
  payments          Payment[]
  reviews           Review[]
}

model Signal {
  id             String    @id @default(cuid())
  providerId     String
  pair           String
  direction      String    // BUY, SELL
  timeframe      String
  analysis       String?
  status         String    @default("active") // active, tp1_hit, tp2_hit, tp3_hit, sl_hit, closed
  entryPrice     Float
  entryZoneLow   Float?
  entryZoneHigh  Float?
  stopLoss       Float
  takeProfit1    Float
  takeProfit2    Float?
  takeProfit3    Float?
  risk           String    @default("medium") // low, medium, high
  chartImage     String?
  outcome        String?   // win, loss, breakeven
  resultPips     Float?
  isFree         Boolean   @default(false)
  isPublished    Boolean   @default(true)
  viewsCount     Int       @default(0)
  closedAt       DateTime?
  createdAt      DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime  @updatedAt

  provider       Provider  @relation(fields: [providerId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
}

model Subscription {
  id            String    @id @default(cuid())
  userId        String
  providerId    String
  status        String    @default("active") // active, expired, cancelled
  plan          String    // weekly, monthly, quarterly, yearly
  amount        Float
  currency      String    @default("UGX")
  startDate     DateTime  @default(now())
  endDate       DateTime
  paymentMethod String?
  paymentStatus String    @default("pending")
  paymentId     String?
  cancelledAt   DateTime?
  createdAt     DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt     DateTime  @updatedAt

  user          User      @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  provider      Provider  @relation(fields: [providerId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
}

model Payment {
  id              String    @id @default(cuid())
  userId          String
  providerId      String?
  subscriptionId  String?
  amount          Float
  platformFee     Float     @default(0)
  providerAmount  Float     @default(0)
  currency        String    @default("UGX")
  type            String    // subscription, withdrawal
  status          String    @default("pending") // pending, confirmed, failed, refunded
  paymentMethod   String
  transactionId   String?
  txHash          String?
  walletAddress   String?
  phoneNumber     String?
  momoReference   String?
  confirmedAt     DateTime?
  createdAt       DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime  @updatedAt

  user            User      @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  provider        Provider? @relation(fields: [providerId], references: [id])
}

model Notification {
  id        String    @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String
  type      String    // new_signal, tp_hit, subscription_expiring, payment_confirmed, new_subscriber, new_review, system
  title     String
  message   String
  data      String?   // JSON string
  isRead    Boolean   @default(false)
  readAt    DateTime?
  createdAt DateTime  @default(now())

  user      User      @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
}

model ProviderApplication {
  id                      String    @id @default(cuid())
  userId                  String
  status                  String    @default("pending") // pending, under_review, approved, rejected
  tradingExperience       Int       @default(0)
  experienceLevel         String    @default("beginner") // beginner, intermediate, advanced, professional
  tradingStyle            String    @default("") // JSON array
  marketsTraded           String    @default("") // JSON array
  averageMonthlySignals   Int       @default(0)
  estimatedWinRate        Float?
  trackRecordDescription  String?
  telegramChannel         String?
  twitterHandle           String?
  tradingViewProfile      String?
  otherSocialLinks        String?
  motivationStatement     String
  identityDocumentUrl     String?
  tradingStatementUrl     String?
  reviewedBy              String?
  reviewedAt              DateTime?
  adminNotes              String?
  rejectionReason         String?
  createdAt               DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime  @updatedAt

  user                    User      @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
}

model Review {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  providerId  String
  userId      String
  rating      Int      // 1-5 stars
  title       String?
  comment     String?
  isVerified  Boolean  @default(false) // Verified purchase
  isPublic    Boolean  @default(true)
  helpfulCount Int     @default(0)
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt

  provider    Provider @relation(fields: [providerId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  user        User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([providerId, userId]) // One review per user per provider
}

model PlatformSettings {
  id                    String   @id @default(cuid())
  platformName          String   @default("PipTray")
  platformDescription   String?
  contactEmail          String?
  platformFeePercent    Float    @default(10)
  enableCrypto          Boolean  @default(true)
  enableMtnMomo         Boolean  @default(true)
  enableAirtelMoney     Boolean  @default(true)
  binanceWalletAddress  String?
  ethereumWalletAddress String?
  mtnMomoNumber         String?
  airtelMoneyNumber     String?
  emailNotifications    Boolean  @default(true)
  createdAt             DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt             DateTime @updatedAt
}
